reason: The V2-E runtime confirmation used an earlier reducer policy. V2-F hardened the reducer by skipping signed, multi-release, sealed, and BootstrapMethods-bearing surfaces, so the productized reducer needs its own runtime screen.

v2eRuntimeConfirmedArtifact.comparison: full P2 vs full P2 + V2-E reducer

notTransferableWithoutV2H: V2-E runtime win cannot be automatically applied to the V2-F hardened/productized reducer.
Doctor V2-G artifact generalization is not a runtime claim.
